- Deskripsi Visual: A tall tree canopy filled with clusters of red-orange blossoms and green foliage fills most of the frame against a pale, overcast sky.

Main Subject:
The image focuses on dense, multi-layered tree foliage with many small red-orange flower clusters and darker green leaves, forming a rounded canopy that rises above the lower vegetation.

Setting:
The scene appears outdoors with a pale gray sky overhead, and additional smaller trees or shrubs with green leaves fill the lower portion of the image.

Visual Details:
The lighting is soft and diffuse, consistent with cloudy daylight. In the foreground and lower left, there are layered plants with lighter green leaves. Across the center and upper portion, the canopy is thick with overlapping leaves and many small, clustered blossoms that stand out in red-orange and rust tones. Near the right edge, part of a person’s face and head is visible in close crop, with the person wearing a light-colored face covering or hood and showing only part of their head and cheek.

No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The photo shows an outdoor view dominated by a large tree with abundant red-orange flower clusters and dense green foliage. A small portion of a person’s face and head appears at the right edge of the frame.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
